parts.text: Hi

Hi there! 👋 Welcome to **Karachi Bites**! I'm Zara, your friendly AI assistant. 😊 

How can I help you today? Would you like to see our full menu, place an order, or get info about our delivery and hours? Just let me know! 🍔🍕
full menu please

Here’s our delicious menu at **Karachi Bites**! 🤤

🍔 **BURGERS**
- Zinger Burger – Rs. 350
- Double Patty Burger – Rs. 450
- Chicken Burger – Rs. 300
- BBQ Burger – Rs. 400
- Veggie Burger – Rs. 250

🍕 **PIZZAS**
- Margherita Pizza – Rs. 800
- Pepperoni Pizza – Rs. 950
- BBQ Chicken Pizza – Rs. 900
- Veggie Supreme Pizza – Rs. 850
- Meat Lovers Pizza – Rs. 1000

🥤 **DRINKS**
- Coke – Rs. 150
- Sprite – Rs. 150
- Fanta – Rs. 150
- Lassi – Rs. 200
- Fresh Juice – Rs. 250

🍮 **DESSERTS**
- Brownie – Rs. 300
- Ice Cream – Rs. 200
- Gulab Jamun – Rs. 150
- Kheer – Rs. 180
- Cake Slice – Rs. 250

Craving something? 😋 Just tell me the item name(s) and how many you'd like, and we'll get your order started! 🛒✨
Zinger burger
Awesome choice! 🍔 How many **Zinger Burgers** (Rs. 350 each) would you like to order? Also, let me know if you'd like to add any sides, drinks, or desserts to your order! 😋
yes cold drink

Great choice! 🥤 Just to confirm, would you like **1 Zinger Burger**? 

Which cold drink would you prefer: **Coke, Sprite, or Fanta**? (All are Rs. 150 each) And how many would you like? 😊
FAnta

Perfect! 🥤 I've noted **1 Fanta** to go with your burger. 

So your order so far is:
🍔 1 Zinger Burger – Rs. 350
🥤 1 Fanta – Rs. 150

Would you like **delivery or pickup**? 🚚📍
delivery

Got it! We'll bring your order straight to your doorstep. 🏠 Please share your **full delivery address** so our rider can find you easily. 

Once I have your address, I'll calculate the total, confirm the payment option (Cash on Delivery, Easypaisa, or JazzCash), and finalize everything for you! 😊📍
Malir, Karcahi

Thank you! 📍 Delivery to **Malir, Karachi** is noted. 

Here’s your complete order summary:
🍔 1x Zinger Burger – Rs. 350
🥤 1x Fanta – Rs. 150
💰 **Total: Rs. 500**
⏱️ Estimated delivery time: 30–45 minutes
💳 You can pay via Cash on Delivery, Easypaisa, or JazzCash

Please reply **"CONFIRM"** along with your preferred payment method, and I’ll lock this in for you! Once confirmed, you’ll receive an order number and your delicious meal will be on its way. 🚴‍♂️✨
plan=ce an order

You're all set! We're already processing your order for 1 Zinger Burger + 1 Fanta. 🍔🥤 

Just let me know your preferred **payment method** (Cash on Delivery, Easypaisa, or JazzCash), and I’ll instantly finalize everything, generate your order number, and share your delivery window! 😊✨ 

*(If you actually meant to start a completely new order from scratch, just say the word and I'll gladly help!)*
new order

Absolutely! Let’s wipe the slate clean and start fresh. 😊 

What would you like to order this time? Just let me know the **item name(s)** and **quantity** for each, and I'll guide you through the rest! 🍔🍕🥤✨
Zinger burger 1, fanta cold drink 1

Awesome! 🍔🥤 I've noted **1 Zinger Burger** (Rs. 350) and **1 Fanta** (Rs. 150). 

Would you like this for **delivery or pickup**? 🚚📍
pickup, where is your location?

Perfect! 📍 For pickup, we're located at **Block 4, Clifton, Karachi**. You can find us easily right on the main road! 🗺️✨

Here’s your order summary:
🍔 1x Zinger Burger – Rs. 350
🥤 1x Fanta – Rs. 150
💰 **Total: Rs. 500**

Please reply **"CONFIRM"** along with your preferred payment method (Cash on Pickup, Easypaisa, or JazzCash), and I’ll finalize everything right away! ⏱️ Once confirmed, an order number will be generated and your meal will be ready for collection in about 20–25 minutes. 😊🚗
cofirm, payment cash

Order confirmed! 🎉 Thank you for your purchase!

📋 **Your Order Summary:**
🍔 1x Zinger Burger – Rs. 350
🥤 1x Fanta – Rs. 150
💵 Payment Method: Cash
📍 Order Type: Pickup at Block 4, Clifton, Karachi
💰 **Total: Rs. 500**

⏱️ An order number will be generated and sent to you shortly. Your meal will be ready for pickup in approximately 20–25 minutes! 

Thank you for choosing **Karachi Bites**! 🇵🇰✨ We look forward to serving you. See you soon!
